_doc: Runtime selector-gate registry for the GoHighLevel browser builder (D8). Each gate is a UI node the builder must act on. status=captured means a real, live-snapshot-verified DOM node (do NOT re-snapshot blindly, but DO verify it still matches). status=runtime means the node is NOT captured and MUST be resolved at runtime by snapshotting the live DOM and picking the ref — NO invented CSS may ship as fact. The `find` hints are accessibility-role/name search seeds for `agent-browser find ...`, NOT confirmed CSS. The agent snapshots first, then matches against these hints, then acts on the returned @ref.

_legend.runtime: MUST capture-at-runtime: snapshot the live DOM, pick the @ref, act. Never hardcode invented CSS.

_capture_pass: 2026-06-21 READ-ONLY pass, app.convertandflow.com, agent-browser 0.27.0, --session ghl-capture. HARD-BLOCKED at login by two-factor authentication: gates 1 and 27 captured; gates 2-26 and 28 BLOCKED behind the two-factor wall and remain runtime snapshot-gates. PENDING-LIVE-RUN.

login_route.note: CAPTURED 2026-06-21: the login FORM mounts ONLY at root '/'. The '/login' path renders a permanently-blank 'Initializing...' shell in automated Chromium (the form component never mounts). Always navigate to root.

gates.name: login_form

captured.password: input#password (name=password, type=password, placeholder 'The password you picked')
captured.also_present: button 'Sign in with Google', language combobox, link 'Forgot password?'

gates.find: find role textbox name Email | find role textbox name Password | find role button name 'Sign in'

gates.name: account_switcher
gates.find: find testid account-switcher | find text <current-subaccount-label> | per-row match by client name
gates.note: HARD GATE A2.3: refuse on sub-account mismatch (no co-mingling).

gates.name: sidebar_sites
gates.find: find role link name Sites | find text Sites (left nav)
gates.note: May be a flyout vs inline; snapshot first.

gates.name: tab_funnels
gates.find: find role tab name Funnels | find text Funnels

gates.name: new_funnel_button
gates.find: find role button name 'New Funnel' | find text '+ New Funnel'

gates.name: funnel_name_input
gates.find: find role textbox name 'Funnel Name' | placeholder 'name'
gates.note: Also disambiguate Blank-here vs Blank-at-step variant (A4.2 NOTE). Support BOTH.

gates.name: create_button
gates.find: find role button name Create

gates.name: add_new_step
gates.find: find role button name 'Add New Step'
gates.note: MUST positively distinguish from the adjacent 'Import' control — match exact name 'Add New Step', never a substring that also matches Import.

gates.name: step_name_and_path_inputs
gates.find: find role textbox name 'Step Name' | find role textbox name 'Path'

gates.name: blank_template
gates.find: find text 'Blank' | find text 'Create from Blank'

gates.name: edit_page
gates.find: find role button name 'Edit' | find text 'Edit Page'

gates.name: editor_iframe_boundary
gates.find: frame @ref | frame main
gates.note: agent-browser 0.27.0 auto-inlines iframes into the snapshot and exposes 'frame @ref' / 'frame main' — scope into the nested editor frame; never assume top frame.

gates.name: add_section_blank
gates.find: find text 'Blank Section' | find role button name Add (in section)

gates.name: full_width_toggle
gates.find: find text 'Allow rows to take up full length' | find text 'Allow rows to take entire width' | find text 'Full Width'
gates.note: Label drifts between variants. Match on EITHER label; verify by TOGGLE STATE (on), not by label text alone.

gates.name: code_element
gates.find: find text Code (under Custom) | find text 'Custom HTML/JavaScript'

gates.name: code_editor_instance
gates.find: find role button name 'Open Code Editor' then locate CodeMirror/Monaco/textarea
gates.note: Set large payloads via the editor's value API (eval), NOT key-by-key typing. The editor modal renders on the MAIN page, not inside the builder iframe.

gates.name: code_element_save
gates.find: find role button name Save (code editor modal)

gates.name: dismiss_ai_popup
gates.find: find role button name Close | find text 'Ask AI' then its X
gates.note: Dismiss on first editor open or it eats the next click. Absent is fine — do not crash.

gates.name: page_save
gates.find: find role button name Save (top toolbar, main page)
gates.note: Wait for the save-confirmation toast, not a fixed sleep.

gates.name: preview
gates.find: find role button name Preview | eyeball icon (top toolbar)

gates.name: publish
gates.find: find role button name Publish
gates.note: NEVER act on this gate without an explicit LIVE approval answer (A13.1).

gates.name: funnel_list_row_open
gates.find: open by funnel_workspace_url (preferred) | find text <exact funnel name> in list row

gates.name: tab_websites
gates.find: find role tab name Websites
gates.note: NEEDS SCREENSHOT of live Website builder; do not assume Funnel parity.

gates.name: new_website_button_and_name
gates.find: find role button name 'New Website' | find role textbox name 'Website Name'

gates.name: website_editor_selectors
gates.find: snapshot each Website editor node independently
gates.note: Website editor selectors may differ from Funnel editor selectors — snapshot both, assume nothing.

gates.name: code_element_iframe_embed
gates.find: same as gate 15 (Code element); payload = single responsive <iframe>

gates.name: auth_storage_keys

captured.firebase_api_key: AIzaSyB_w3vXmsI7WeQtrIOkjR6xTRVN5uOieiE (hardcoded in Skill 44 transport.py; not an env var)

gates.note: CORRECTS the GOAL spec §2.4 which assumed localStorage. Auth is in IndexedDB. Seed via seed-ghl-auth.py + inject-ghl-auth.sh. The exact fbase_key value + post-login session cookies still need a logged-in capture to confirm verbatim.

gates.name: ghl_published_domain_for_frame_ancestors
gates.find: read the published page's own origin after first publish
gates.note: Only knowable from a published page. Whitelist it in the Vercel app's frame-ancestors / X-Frame-Options for Mode 2 embeds.
